## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Teero and GrowthX to discuss SEO performance, content strategy, and new product developments.](https://fathom.video/share/TsBUUoaeHqDF4mVwHcHfscpUdZzTEF4t?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [SEO performance remains strong, with Teero showing healthy growth despite industry-wide challenges from AI overviews](https://fathom.video/share/TsBUUoaeHqDF4mVwHcHfscpUdZzTEF4t?tab=summary&timestamp=303.0)
  - [New insurance verification product launch expected in 1-2 months; content strategy to be aligned accordingly](https://fathom.video/share/TsBUUoaeHqDF4mVwHcHfscpUdZzTEF4t?tab=summary&timestamp=1063.0)
  - [Payment posting identified as a potential future product with significant market opportunity ($2B)](https://fathom.video/share/TsBUUoaeHqDF4mVwHcHfscpUdZzTEF4t?tab=summary&timestamp=1571.0)
  - [Team to refresh existing insurance-related content and create new, hyper-specific content based on Nate's insights](https://fathom.video/share/TsBUUoaeHqDF4mVwHcHfscpUdZzTEF4t?tab=summary&timestamp=1613.0)

## Topics

### SEO Performance and LLM Strategy

  - [Teero showing strong SEO growth, outperforming many clients facing stagnation due to AI overviews](https://fathom.video/share/TsBUUoaeHqDF4mVwHcHfscpUdZzTEF4t?tab=summary&timestamp=582.0)
  - [GrowthX focusing on LLM optimization, including "chunking" content for better AI ingestion](https://fathom.video/share/TsBUUoaeHqDF4mVwHcHfscpUdZzTEF4t?tab=summary&timestamp=398.0)
  - [Team to incorporate more actionable insights and tangible wins (e.g., featured snippets) in future reports](https://fathom.video/share/TsBUUoaeHqDF4mVwHcHfscpUdZzTEF4t?tab=summary&timestamp=914.0)

### New Insurance Verification Product

  - [Launch expected in 1-2 months; currently working with 5 design partners](https://fathom.video/share/TsBUUoaeHqDF4mVwHcHfscpUdZzTEF4t?tab=summary&timestamp=1068.0)
  - [Product aims to streamline insurance verification process for dental practices](https://fathom.video/share/TsBUUoaeHqDF4mVwHcHfscpUdZzTEF4t?tab=summary&timestamp=1364.0)
  - [Content strategy to focus on insurance verification, choosing insurances, and optimizing collections](https://fathom.video/share/TsBUUoaeHqDF4mVwHcHfscpUdZzTEF4t?tab=summary&timestamp=1174.0)

### Future Product: Payment Posting

  - [Identified as a $2B market opportunity (2% of $100B annual insurance collections)](https://fathom.video/share/TsBUUoaeHqDF4mVwHcHfscpUdZzTEF4t?tab=summary&timestamp=1579.0)
  - [Nate expressed strong interest in pursuing this as a potential third product](https://fathom.video/share/TsBUUoaeHqDF4mVwHcHfscpUdZzTEF4t?tab=summary&timestamp=1571.0)
  - [Team to start creating content around payment posting topics to establish authority](https://fathom.video/share/TsBUUoaeHqDF4mVwHcHfscpUdZzTEF4t?tab=summary&timestamp=1504.0)

### Content Strategy Adjustments

  - [Refresh existing insurance-related content (published March-May) to improve rankings](https://fathom.video/share/TsBUUoaeHqDF4mVwHcHfscpUdZzTEF4t?tab=summary&timestamp=1643.0)
  - [Create new, hyper-specific content based on Nate's detailed insights](https://fathom.video/share/TsBUUoaeHqDF4mVwHcHfscpUdZzTEF4t?tab=summary&timestamp=1613.0)
  - [Consider separate content pipelines for different products to ensure targeted, authoritative content](https://fathom.video/share/TsBUUoaeHqDF4mVwHcHfscpUdZzTEF4t?tab=summary&timestamp=1690.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Refresh existing insurance-related content to improve rankings and traffic](https://fathom.video/share/TsBUUoaeHqDF4mVwHcHfscpUdZzTEF4t?tab=summary&timestamp=1643.0)
  - [Develop new content strategy focusing on insurance verification and related topics](https://fathom.video/share/TsBUUoaeHqDF4mVwHcHfscpUdZzTEF4t?tab=summary&timestamp=1613.0)
  - [Explore creation of payment posting content to establish early authority](https://fathom.video/share/TsBUUoaeHqDF4mVwHcHfscpUdZzTEF4t?tab=summary&timestamp=1571.0)
  - [Incorporate more actionable insights and tangible wins in future performance reports](https://fathom.video/share/TsBUUoaeHqDF4mVwHcHfscpUdZzTEF4t?tab=summary&timestamp=914.0)
  - [Investigate potential for customized content artifacts for different product lines](https://fathom.video/share/TsBUUoaeHqDF4mVwHcHfscpUdZzTEF4t?tab=summary&timestamp=1717.0)
